causes: Plant air low; SP1 misadjusted; SP1 failed
checks_steps: Check plant air supply; Verify regulator pressure ~75 PSI; Check SP1 input state
fix: Restore plant air; Adjust regulator; Replace SP1 if faulty
notes: Air supply should remain between 5–6 bar
